item.title: Health Week: March 31 — April 06, 2026
item.description: Sleep No sleep data available this week. Activity Metric This Week Previous Week Trend Active Minutes 483.0 min — — Body Composition Metric This Week Previous Week Trend Avg Fasted Glucose ~5.0 mmol/L ~5.9 mmol/L -0.9 mmol/L Avg Ketones ~1.9 mmol/L ~1.2 mmol/L +0.7 mmol/L Weight 133.6 kg 136.8 kg -1.6 kg Total Change (from start) -6.6 kg Started at 140.2 kg 133.6 kg current Weight Trend Glucose & Ketone Trends Nutrition Day Meals Protein Carbs Fat Calories 2026-03-31 1 ~7.
